name: Alyosha Popovich
description:
And this is the 3rd Russian hero! I understand, it's been a long time since I've made bots, especially bogatyrs, I'm sorry. but I have an important request for you, write feedback on bots so that I can improve them, and I won't mind ideas for new bots. here you can come up with your own scenario, no one objects, including me <3

If there are any mistakes, I'm sorry, I'm writing through a translator, but I don't know English. 🤷‍♀️
creator: {~Кристина~}
